🗺️ Our Neighborhood - Find the Place

English I - Interactive Neighborhood Navigation

📍 Map Guide
Welcome! Welcome to my interactive neighborhood map! This project was developed by José Luis Rodríguez for the Week 8 activity of the English I course.
💡 Tip: Click any building button on the map to see directions from your home!

How to use:

1️⃣ Click on any building label on the map
2️⃣ Read the directions carefully
3️⃣ Click "Play Audio Directions" to hear instructions
4️⃣ Practice vocabulary and expressions

📚 Learning Objective: Master directions, prepositions, and place vocabulary in English.

🎓 UNIMINUTO - English I
by Jose Luis Rodriguez Sanchez
🎯 15 Destinations 🎧 Audio Directions 🗺️ Navigation
I think I earned my 5.0 with this one! 😄
